skillGeneratorInput.note: No skill candidates generated this cycle — zero-signal cycle. Candidates below reflect last known good state (cycle 31) and are preserved for reference only. Scores and recommendations are from cycle 31 data.

candidateSkills.name: eval-design-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Answers eval scoping, coverage, tooling mechanics, AI judge grading, production readiness, and CLI troubleshooting questions autonomously. Directly reduces BSI 89 CRITICAL bottleneck on single PM DRI.
triggerExamples: How should I design evals for this use case?
What eval coverage do I need before shipping?
How does the CLI CSV import work for evals?
Can you help me scope an evaluation framework?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Addresses BSI 89 CRITICAL — 15 requests/cycle funneling to single PM. T1 automation unblocks 226+ occ/year, ~94 hours of bottleneck time.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Extracts structured action items, owners, and deadlines from meeting transcripts and notes. Outputs formatted Loop document or email summary. Chain head of 6-pattern dependency graph.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from this meeting transcript
Summarize what we decided and who owns what
Turn these meeting notes into a Loop document
What did we commit to in today's meeting?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: 339 occ across 31 cycles, 61 hrs saved/year. SGI 92 CRITICAL — highest standardization gap. Chain head: unlocks transcript-to-loop, weekly-status, and team-status downstream patterns.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Synthesizes eval results data into structured reports with trend analysis, score distributions, and actionable recommendations. Deadline-amplified by EvalCon 2026-04-02.
triggerExamples: Synthesize these eval results into a report
What patterns do you see across these evaluation scores?
Create an exec summary of our eval performance
Analyze these eval metrics and flag regressions
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Highest valueScore in portfolio (95). 434 occ, 88 hrs. EvalCon deadline amplification. RISING trend across 31 cycles.

candidateSkills.name: calendar-triage-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Analyzes meeting load, identifies low-value recurring meetings, recommends declines or async alternatives, and flags overloaded days. EDII-amplified for external partner meetings.
triggerExamples: Review my calendar and tell me what I can skip
Am I in too many meetings this week?
Which meetings could be async instead?
Triage my schedule for the highest-value use of my time
candidateSkills.valueProposition: 430 hrs/year, MPBI 14 (highest ever). EDII 5.0+ amplifies external meeting pattern value. Largest single time sink in portfolio.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies and routes Azure DevOps email notifications into 5 sub-categories (IcM, Coverage, Evals, Tasks, Epics) and suppresses noise. SATURATED pattern — highest volume in history (863 occ).
triggerExamples: Triage my ADO notification emails
Which DevOps notifications actually need my attention?
Route these ADO emails to the right categories
Filter out the noise from my Azure DevOps alerts
candidateSkills.valueProposition: 863 occ, SATURATED. Decomposition overdue 19 cycles. 5 sub-classifiers ready. Highest automation ceiling in notification archetype (92).
